history.content: Hey claw, so if you were to build a lead finding system within smallclaw. something that can propose websites and what not to small businesses how would you build it

Done — I continued and created `lead-finder-mvp.md` with the full build blueprint (workflow, schema, scoring, offers, outreach cadence, and 1-week implementation order).  
If you want, next I can generate the actual Supabase SQL migration file from this spec.
